## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss trademark strategy for GrowthX Labs, considering potential conflicts with an existing similar trademark.](https://fathom.video/share/Ai9wnbuztCcSxDHHWyTUVc_pZ5jinb8B?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX Labs faces a trademark conflict with another company using a similar "GrowthX" mark](https://fathom.video/share/Ai9wnbuztCcSxDHHWyTUVc_pZ5jinb8B?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Two main strategies: 1) "fly under the radar" without filing, or 2) file and potentially confront the issue](https://fathom.video/share/Ai9wnbuztCcSxDHHWyTUVc_pZ5jinb8B?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Actual trademark protection comes from use; registration provides presumption of validity](https://fathom.video/share/Ai9wnbuztCcSxDHHWyTUVc_pZ5jinb8B?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
  - [Company needs to assess risk appetite and decide on approach post-fundraising](https://fathom.video/share/Ai9wnbuztCcSxDHHWyTUVc_pZ5jinb8B?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)

## Topics

### Current Trademark Situation

  - [GrowthX Labs discovered another company with a similar "GrowthX" trademark](https://fathom.video/share/Ai9wnbuztCcSxDHHWyTUVc_pZ5jinb8B?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
  - [Other company's registered services are broad (e.g., "go-to-market services", "marketing webinars")](https://fathom.video/share/Ai9wnbuztCcSxDHHWyTUVc_pZ5jinb8B?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
  - [Reality: Other company appears to be a venture capital fund, not a SaaS product like GrowthX Labs](https://fathom.video/share/Ai9wnbuztCcSxDHHWyTUVc_pZ5jinb8B?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)

### Trademark Strategy Options

  - ["Fly under the radar" approach:](https://fathom.video/share/Ai9wnbuztCcSxDHHWyTUVc_pZ5jinb8B?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
      - [Continue using mark without filing for registration](https://fathom.video/share/Ai9wnbuztCcSxDHHWyTUVc_pZ5jinb8B?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
      - [Minimize likelihood of confusion through distinct usage](https://fathom.video/share/Ai9wnbuztCcSxDHHWyTUVc_pZ5jinb8B?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
      - [Pros: Low-key, potentially years of coexistence strengthening argument](https://fathom.video/share/Ai9wnbuztCcSxDHHWyTUVc_pZ5jinb8B?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)
      - [Cons: Harder to enforce rights without registration](https://fathom.video/share/Ai9wnbuztCcSxDHHWyTUVc_pZ5jinb8B?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
  - [File for registration approach:](https://fathom.video/share/Ai9wnbuztCcSxDHHWyTUVc_pZ5jinb8B?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)
      - [Attempt to register own trademark](https://fathom.video/share/Ai9wnbuztCcSxDHHWyTUVc_pZ5jinb8B?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)
      - [Pros: Stronger protection, presumption of validity](https://fathom.video/share/Ai9wnbuztCcSxDHHWyTUVc_pZ5jinb8B?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
      - [Cons: Increases likelihood of confrontation with prior user](https://fathom.video/share/Ai9wnbuztCcSxDHHWyTUVc_pZ5jinb8B?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)

### Legal Considerations

  - [Courts consider actual marketplace reality, not just registered services](https://fathom.video/share/Ai9wnbuztCcSxDHHWyTUVc_pZ5jinb8B?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
  - [Coexistence possible (e.g., United Airlines vs. United Van Lines)](https://fathom.video/share/Ai9wnbuztCcSxDHHWyTUVc_pZ5jinb8B?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [Options if trademark office cites prior registration:](https://fathom.video/share/Ai9wnbuztCcSxDHHWyTUVc_pZ5jinb8B?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)
      - [Argue no confusion](https://fathom.video/share/Ai9wnbuztCcSxDHHWyTUVc_pZ5jinb8B?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
      - [Potentially file for partial cancellation of other mark](https://fathom.video/share/Ai9wnbuztCcSxDHHWyTUVc_pZ5jinb8B?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)

### International Trademark Process

  - [U.S. companies typically file U.S. application first](https://fathom.video/share/Ai9wnbuztCcSxDHHWyTUVc_pZ5jinb8B?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Paris Convention allows 6-month priority in member countries](https://fathom.video/share/Ai9wnbuztCcSxDHHWyTUVc_pZ5jinb8B?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [U.S. requires use before registration; most foreign countries don't](https://fathom.video/share/Ai9wnbuztCcSxDHHWyTUVc_pZ5jinb8B?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
  - [Foreign registrations often open to non-use cancellation after 3 years](https://fathom.video/share/Ai9wnbuztCcSxDHHWyTUVc_pZ5jinb8B?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)

### Womble Dickinson Services

  - [Large firm with \~250 IP attorneys](https://fathom.video/share/Ai9wnbuztCcSxDHHWyTUVc_pZ5jinb8B?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)
  - [Offers full spectrum of IP services: trademarks, patents, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/Ai9wnbuztCcSxDHHWyTUVc_pZ5jinb8B?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
  - [Engagement process: Send engagement letter with representation details](https://fathom.video/share/Ai9wnbuztCcSxDHHWyTUVc_pZ5jinb8B?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Assess Marcel's risk appetite for trademark strategy post-fundraising](https://fathom.video/share/Ai9wnbuztCcSxDHHWyTUVc_pZ5jinb8B?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
  - [Evaluate pros/cons of each approach (file vs. don't file)](https://fathom.video/share/Ai9wnbuztCcSxDHHWyTUVc_pZ5jinb8B?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
  - [Decide on preferred strategy and potentially re-engage with Tom Daly](https://fathom.video/share/Ai9wnbuztCcSxDHHWyTUVc_pZ5jinb8B?tab=summary&timestamp=933.0)
  - [If moving forward, await engagement letter from Womble Dickinson](https://fathom.video/share/Ai9wnbuztCcSxDHHWyTUVc_pZ5jinb8B?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
